SLNO.notes: Deal announced Q1 2026, closing Q2-Q3 2026. Regulatory approvals pending.

APLS.notes: Acquired by Biogen (BIIB). Deal terms (per-share consideration, total $, premium, closing date) TBD -- update when official terms confirmed. Apellis assets (Syfovre GA, Empaveli PNH/C3G, APL-3007 siRNA, APL-90992 FcRn) transferred to BIIB config.
